title: EzWaypoints
description: Lightweight waypoint mod with no minimap. Simple, fast, and easy to use.
body:
# 📍 EzWaypoints

![EzWaypoints - banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00b8d81f0d749829942e2d39764793ba469b608a.png)

---

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.8--1.21.11-5E7C16?style=for-the-badge)
![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-DBD0B4?style=for-the-badge)
![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client--Side-1F6FEB?style=for-the-badge)
[![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-GitHub-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/KristopherZlo/ezwaypoints)

---

## 🎥 Preview

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UmbdtYSyb8Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

> Waypoints without a minimap.

> Clean. Simple. Shareable. No extra stuff.

---

## 🧠 What is this?

**Simple waypoint mod without a minimap.**

* No clutter
* No huge settings menu
* No manual commands

Just waypoints.

---

## ✨ Why use this?

Many waypoint mods are built around a minimap and a lot of extra features.

This mod is for players who:

* do not want a minimap
* do not want to configure 50 settings
* just want clean waypoint labels in the world

If map-based waypoint mods like Xaero's feel too busy, EzWaypoints is the simpler option:

* easier to learn
* fewer hotkeys
* less menu clutter
* focused on waypoints only

---

## 🎮 Controls

* `N` → New waypoint
* `B` → Show waypoint labels
* `Open Waypoint Manager` → Unbound by default

You can switch `B` between:

* Toggle mode
* Hold mode

---

## ⚙️ Features

* Clean in-game waypoint manager
* Works on servers as a client-side mod
* Separate waypoints per world/server
* Singleplayer worlds with the same name stay separate
* Copy and paste waypoint share codes
* Import skips exact duplicates automatically
* Colored labels
* Adjustable label size
* Optional Y coordinate
* Overworld ↔ Nether linking (`X/Z` scale ×8)
* Teleport button (only when `/tp` or `/teleport` is available to you)
* Chat feedback for actions like add, import, delete, and copy

---

## ❓ FAQ

### Can I send my waypoints to another player?

Yes! Export them as a share code and send the code.

---

### Does this mod add a minimap?

No. This mod only adds waypoints.

---

### Does it work on servers?

Yes. It is client-side mod.

---

### Do I need to install it on the server?

No.

---

### Are waypoints shared between servers/worlds?

No. Each world/server has its own waypoints.

---

### Does importing add duplicates?

No. If a waypoint with the same name, color, dimension, and coordinates already exists, it will be skipped.

---

### Where are waypoints stored?

`config/ezwaypoints/ezwaypoints.json`

---

### Why is there no teleport button?

It only appears if `tp` or `teleport` is available and you have permission to use it.

---

## 📁 Additional Info

* Supports Minecraft `1.21.8 - 1.21.11`
* Fabric only
* Client-side only
* MIT License
